steps.title: Set the equations equal
steps.content:
Both expressions equal $y$, so set them equal:
$$(x-3)(x+5)=8x-24$$
Factor the right side:
$$(x-3)(x+5)=8(x-3)$$

steps.title: Solve for the intersection
steps.content: Move all terms to one side and factor: $$(x-3)(x+5)-8(x-3)=0$$ $$(x-3)(x-3)=0$$ $$x=3$$ Then $y=8(3)-24=0$. The answer is C.
